betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6FEL§f and §6SILEX§f work together for advanced isotope separation.

§eTask Requirements:§f
• §bFEL Machine§f (Free Electron Laser)
• §bSILEX Machine§f (Separation of Isotopes by Laser Excitation)
• §bCO2-Desh Laser Crystal§f

§eFEL (7x3x3 multiblock):§f
Generates high-intensity laser beams. Wavelength/power set by laser crystal.

§eSILEX:§f
Uses FEL laser to separate isotopes from liquid compounds.
• Place §b2+ blocks from FEL§f in laser path
• §aOne beam powers up to 5 SILEXes§f

§eCrystal Power Requirements:§f
• §bCO2-Desh§f - 75 kHE/s
• §bBiSmUTh§f - 300 kHE/s
• §bSpark§f - 4.8 MHE/s

§eSILEX Capabilities:§f
• Uranium/Plutonium enrichment
• Nuclear waste processing
• Mineral extraction (Lapis → Cobalt)

§c§4WARNING:§f Laser destroys most blocks! Use §bConcrete§f or §bQuartz Glass§f walls.
